description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the chef/chefdk Docker image with a docker:dind service and defines the variables DOCKER_HOST=tcp://docker:2375 and KITCHEN_LOCAL_YAML=.kitchen.dokken.yml. Define three stages: lint, unit, functional. Add a lint job named cookstyle that runs the command chef exec cookstyle . and a lint job named foodcritic that runs chef exec foodcritic . . Add a unit job named chefspec that runs chef exec rspec spec. No caches, artifacts, or special rules are required.
